title: Day 22 — Hobbies · gern · Word Order
goal: 🎯 Today you talk about what you love doing — and nail the #1 German word-order rule for good.
introHtml:
Day 22 · Hobbies & Free Time — gern & Word Order Mastery

🎯 Today you talk about what you love doing — and nail the #1 German word-order rule for good.

sections.title: 📖 Grammar lesson
sections.html:
📖 Grammar lesson

1. gern / lieber / am liebsten

  • Ich spiele gern Fußball. — I like playing football.
  • Ich schwimme lieber. — I prefer swimming.
  • Ich lese am liebsten. — I like reading best of all.
  • Negative: Ich koche nicht gern.

2. THE rule: the verb is ALWAYS second

Position 1 can be anything — subject, time, place. The conjugated verb never moves from position 2:

Position 1Verb (2)Rest
Ichspieleam Sonntag Tennis.
Am Sonntagspieleich Tennis.
Tennisspieleich am Sonntag.
⚠️ English speakers write "Am Sonntag ich spiele..." — WRONG. When anything other than the subject starts the sentence, subject and verb swap ("inversion"). Drill this today until it hurts, then until it doesn't.

3. Time before place

When both appear, time usually comes first: Ich gehe am Samstag ins Kino.

4. Frequency words

immer (always), oft (often), manchmal (sometimes), selten (rarely), nie (never)

Ich gehe oft schwimmen. Manchmal spiele ich Schach. (See? Verb still second.)

sections.title: 📚 Vocabulary (16 items)
sections.html:
📚 Vocabulary (16 items)
GermanEnglish
das Hobby, -shobby
die Freizeitfree time
Fußball spielento play football
Musik hörento listen to music
lesen (er liest)to read
kochen / backento cook / to bake
tanzento dance
wandernto hike
reisento travel
malen / fotografierento paint / to photograph
Rad fahrento cycle
Freunde treffen (er trifft)to meet friends
Sport machento do sport
das Spiel, -egame, match
die Musik / die Bandmusic / band
langweilig / interessantboring / interesting

sections.title: 💬 Example sentences
sections.html:
💬 Example sentences
  1. Was machst du in deiner Freizeit? What do you do in your free time?
  2. Ich höre gern Musik und ich koche sehr gern. I like listening to music and I really like cooking.
  3. Am Wochenende treffe ich oft Freunde. On weekends I often meet friends.
  4. Er spielt lieber Fußball als Tennis. He prefers football to tennis.
  5. Am liebsten reise ich. Most of all, I like travelling.
  6. Schach finde ich langweilig. I find chess boring.

sections.title: 🗣 Dialogue: Hobbys
sections.html:
🗣 Dialogue: Hobbys

Katja: Was machst du gern in deiner Freizeit? (What do you like doing in your free time?)

Bruno: Ich fahre gern Rad und ich fotografiere. Und du? (I like cycling and I take photos. You?)

Katja: Ich tanze gern. Am liebsten höre ich aber Musik. (I like dancing. But most of all I listen to music.)

Bruno: Welche Musik hörst du? (What music do you listen to?)

Katja: Rock! Am Freitag spielt meine Lieblingsband. Kommst du mit? (Rock! On Friday my favourite band is playing. Coming along?)

Bruno: Klar, gern! (Sure, gladly!)

💡 Lieblings- sticks onto anything: Lieblingsband, Lieblingsfilm, Lieblingsessen = favourite band/film/food.

sections.title: 🎤 Speaking practice
sections.html:
🎤 Speaking practice
  1. Your hobby ranking aloud: Ich ... gern. Ich ... lieber. Am liebsten ...
  2. Inversion drill — start each sentence with the time: Am Montag..., Am Wochenende..., Abends..., Manchmal... + verb + ich. Five sentences.
  3. Frequency ladder: one true sentence each with immer, oft, manchmal, selten, nie.

sections.title: 🎧 Listening practice
sections.html:
🎧 Listening practice
  • YouTube: "Easy German hobbies" — what do real Germans do in their free time?
  • Nicos Weg A1 — free time episodes.
  • Listen to one German song and find the lyrics ("Songtext"); highlight words you know.

sections.title: 📰 Reading practice
sections.html:
📰 Reading practice

Familie Novak hat viele Hobbys. Der Vater kocht gern — am liebsten italienisch. Die Mutter fährt oft Rad, manchmal 50 Kilometer! Die Tochter malt gern und fotografiert. Der Sohn? Er spielt immer Computerspiele. „Das ist kein Hobby!", sagt der Vater. „Doch!", sagt der Sohn.

  1. What does each family member like doing?
  2. What's the disagreement at the end?
Answer key

1. Father: cooking (Italian best of all); mother: cycling; daughter: painting and photography; son: computer games. 2. Whether computer games count as a hobby — the son insists "Doch!" (yes they do!).

sections.title: ✍️ Writing task
sections.html:
✍️ Writing task

Write 8 sentences about your free time. Rules: at least 3 sentences must NOT start with "Ich" (start with a time or frequency word instead), and use gern/lieber/am liebsten once each.

sections.title: ❓ Mini quiz
sections.html:
❓ Mini quiz
  1. Fix: Am Samstag ich spiele Fußball.
  2. Rank it: gern → ? → ?
  3. Translate: "Sometimes I read in the evening." (start with Manchmal)
  4. "never" = ?
  5. Time or place first: "Ich fahre ___ ___" (am Sonntag / nach Bonn)?
Answer key
  1. Am Samstag spiele ich Fußball.
  2. gern → lieber → am liebsten
  3. Manchmal lese ich am Abend. / Manchmal lese ich abends.
  4. nie
  5. Ich fahre am Sonntag nach Bonn. (time before place)

sections.html:

sections.title: 📌 Homework
sections.html:
📌 Homework
  1. Write your Lieblings-list: Lieblingsessen, Lieblingsfilm, Lieblingsstadt + one gern-sentence about each.
  2. Inversion patrol: today, every German sentence you speak or write that starts with a time word gets a word-order check.

sections.title: 🔄 Revision (Week 3)
sections.html:
🔄 Revision (Week 3)
  • Test 3 mistakes — redo them now.
  • Modals + hobbies combo: Ich kann gut ... / Ich will ... lernen.
